# one tribe

> A multilingual memory wall where the global hard-dance / Defqon.1 community
> shares festival memories — photos, GIFs and video links, with captions
> translated across 17 languages. A non-profit fan project. Not affiliated
> with, endorsed by or connected to Q-dance, ID&T or Defqon.1.

Key facts:

- Content: user-submitted festival memories ("moments"), each living at
  https://onetribe.world/en/m/{id} — photos and GIFs are hosted, videos are
  external links (YouTube) only.
- Languages: the same content is served per-locale at
  https://onetribe.world/{locale}/ for en, nl, de, es, fr, it, pt, pl, sv,
  tr, id, th, vi, zh, zh-Hant, ja and ko.
- Non-profit: no ads, no merchandise, no paid features. Voluntary
  server-cost donations only, with no perks attached.
- Moderation: post-moderation with community reporting and a takedown
  process for anyone appearing in a photo.

## Pages

- [The wall](https://onetribe.world/en): the shared memory wall, newest first
- [About](https://onetribe.world/en/about): what one tribe is and who runs it
- [Community guidelines](https://onetribe.world/en/guidelines)
- [Privacy policy](https://onetribe.world/en/privacy)
- [Terms](https://onetribe.world/en/terms)
- [Takedown](https://onetribe.world/en/takedown): removal requests

## Contact

- privacy@onetribe.world
